title: holy notebook!
content:
if i were in the US right now, the  "new 12" powerbook":http://www.apple.com/powerbook/index12.html  would be mine! i'm drooling all over the places already. that's all i'm going to say today. no, that's ALL i can say today. now forgive me, i've to go mourn. :'(

 %(me)the new powerbook series has just been announced by  "steve jobs":http://www.apple.com/pr/bios/jobs.html  a couple of hours ago during  "his keynote":http://www.apple.com/keynote/  at macworld expo 2003 in  **san francisco**  (!!). i've been to the show 3 times and  **spectacular**  is all i can say.%

 "!/gallery/misc/powerbook_new.jpg!
":http://www.apple.com/powerbook/index12.html
